global.description: The ad features a vibrant green background with engaging text and decorative elements.
global.main_message: Encouraging players to join and earn rewards.

elements.label: Ad background
elements.description: Full canvas background of the mobile advertisement.

elements.label: VoxelRealm logo
elements.description: A stylized logo featuring the text 'VoxelRealm' in bold, prominent letters at the top of the ad.

elements.label: Top decorative element
elements.description: A geometric shape or pattern in the background, adding visual interest without specific details.

elements.label: Center decorative element
elements.description: A similar geometric shape or pattern as the top element, positioned in the center of the ad.

elements.label: Center decorative element
elements.description: Another geometric shape or pattern, complementing the overall design in the center area.

elements.label: Top left decorative element
elements.description: A small decorative shape located at the top left, contributing to the overall design.

elements.label: Main message text
elements.description: Text reading 'Beat your rivals Free rewards for new players' in a clear, readable font centered in the ad.

elements.label: Top right decorative element
elements.description: A small decorative shape located at the top right, enhancing the visual appeal.

elements.label: Center right decorative element
elements.description: A small decorative shape positioned in the center right area of the ad.

elements.label: Top left small decorative element
elements.description: A tiny decorative shape located at the top left, adding detail to the design.

elements.label: Center left small decorative element
elements.description: A tiny decorative shape positioned in the center left area of the ad.

elements.label: Main headline
elements.description: The prominent text 'VoxelRealm' at the top, designed to catch the viewer's attention.

elements.label: Main message text
elements.description: The text 'Beat your rivals Free rewards for new players' in a bold, engaging font.
elements.text_content: Beat your rivals Free rewards for new players

elements.label: Call to action
elements.description: A button with the text 'Shop now' at the bottom, inviting users to take action.

embedding_texts.global_text: unknown, unknown, rewarded_video, bright and playful, VoxelRealm, rewards for new players
embedding_texts.layout_text: The headline is at the top, the main message is centered, and the CTA is at the bottom.
embedding_texts.ocr_text: VoxelRealm, Beat your rivals Free rewards for new players, Shop now
